creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
- Update to 1.0rc1
- Add option to choose to depend on atlas instead
- Fix atlas detection
- Use feclearexcept(3) rather than fpsetsticky(3) on 5.3+
- Maintainer CC'd

Modified files:
  math/py-numpy/
	Makefile
	distinfo
	pkg-plist

Added files:
  math/py-numpy/files
	patch-numpy-core-include-numpy-ufuncobject.h
	patch-numpy-distutils-system_info.py
	site.cfg

Removed files:
  math/py-numpy/files
	patch-system_info.py
